zh.lifeSummary: 當William Pipe Swyfen於1397年出生在英國德比夏爾哈登 霍爾時，他的父親Robert de Swynfen48歲，母親Joan de Pipe42歲。他於1414年與Joyce de Durvassal在英國德比夏爾奧維 哈登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1425年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯文分享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Pipe Swyfen于1397年出生在英国德比夏爾哈登 霍爾时，他的父亲Robert de Swynfen48岁，母亲Joan de Pipe42岁。他于1414年与Joyce de Durvassal在英国德比夏爾奧維 哈登结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1425年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯文分享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Pipe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When William Pipe Swyfen was born in 1397, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, his father, Robert de Swynfen, was 48 and his mother, Joan de Pipe, was 42. He married Joyce de Durvassal in 1414, in Over Haddon, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1425, in Swinfen, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Pipe Swyfen est né en 1397, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Swynfen, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Joan de Pipe, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Joyce de Durvassal en 1414, à Over Haddon, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1425, à Swinfen, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Pipe Swyfen 1397 in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Swynfen 48 und seine Mutter Joan de Pipe 42. Er hat 1414 in Over Haddon, Derbyshire, England Joyce de Durvassal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1425 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Swinfen, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Pipe Swyfen è nato il nel 1397 nel Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Swynfen, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Pipe, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Joyce de Durvassal nel 1414, nel Over Haddon, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1425, nel Swinfen, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Pipe Swyfenが1397年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルで生まれた時，父Robert de Swynfenは48歳，母Joan de Pipeは42歳であった。1414年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアオバー ハッドオンでJoyce de Durvassalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1425年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウィンフンで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Pipe Swyfen(이)가 1397년 영국 더비실르 하던 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Swynfen(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Pipe(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1414년 영국 더비실르 버 하던에서 Joyce de Durvassal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스윈펜에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Pipe Swyfen nasceu em 1397, em Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Swynfen, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Pipe, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Joyce de Durvassal em 1414, em Over Haddon, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1425, em Swinfen, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Pipe Swyfen родился в 1397 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Swynfen было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Pipe, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Joyce de Durvassal в 1414 г. в местности овир хаддон, дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1425 г. в местности свинфен, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Pipe Swyfen nació en 1397, en Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Swynfen, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Joan de Pipe, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Joyce de Durvassal en 1414, en Over Haddon, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1425, en Swinfen, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 28 años.
